relevance_spans.text: The second element is the concept of Hansei. This is all about responsibility, self-reflection, and organizational learning.
According to Jeffrey Leiker's book The Toyota Way, it all comes down to being a true learning organization.
Toyota is renowned for its excellence in manufacturing and continuous improvement.

title: Lean Leadership: 3 Key Elements of Toyota's Learning Organization
